title: Dagger Swords
description: Texture pack that reduces the height of the swords by 3 pixels and makes the handles shorter.
body:
## Dagger Swords

This texture pack modifies the modern sword textures to make them 3 pixels lower, and makes their handles shorter, which makes them look sharper. This makes the swords look like daggers (hence the name).

###### also the tips of the swords are slanted bc it looks cool

This means you can see slightly better in combat, much like most PvP texture pack swords, but this is different in that it matches vanilla style, and it doesn't make the swords' blades 1 pixel wide and 2 pixels long.

1.8.9 and modern versions soon!

##### Note: They're still called swords in-game.
